/usr/bin/cc -I../include -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/hal/hal_timer.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/drivers/can_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/drivers/can_messages.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/rtos/scheduler.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/features/sensor_fusion.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/features/acc_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/features/lka_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/features/bsd_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/features/parking_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/features/hha_controller.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/diagnostics/dtc_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/adas_ecu_sim.dir/src/main.c.o -o adas_ecu_sim
